name: Jesse Kegley
roleLine: Robotics Engineering student at UC Santa Cruz, engineering intern at an aerospace startup, and experienced welder/fabricator.
summary: I love to learn about and design mechanical, electrical, and software-based systems, focusing my studies on the sensors and actuators they're comprised of in the modern day.
availability: Open to internships in embedded systems, controls, mechatronics, and manufacturing engineering.
